message:
fix(encode): use saturating arithmetic to prevent integer overflow

Replace unchecked multiplication/addition with saturating variants
in all indentation calculation functions. Previously, deeply nested
structures could cause integer overflow when computing indent_chars
(indent_size * depth), leading to incorrect capacity allocations.

Affected functions:
- indented_line
- indented_key_value_line
- indented_key_colon_line
- indented_list_item
- indented_list_item_key_value
- indented_list_item_key_colon
- indented_list_item_key_header

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
